acceptMessage: Thank you for partnering with DivineSMP. We look forward to growing together!

partnerEmbed.title: 💼 DivinePartners — Partner Application
partnerEmbed.description: Want to partner with **DivineSMP**? Click the button below to begin your application. Make sure your server meets our requirements before applying.

fields.name: 📋 Requirements
fields.value:
• Minimum 50 members
• Active community
• No NSFW content
• Active staff team!

fields.name: ⏱️ Response Time
fields.value: We aim to review all applications within 48 hours.

partnerEmbed.footer: DivinePartners • Applications are reviewed by our staff team

questions.label: Member Count
questions.placeholder: How many members does your server have?

questions.label: Server Description
questions.placeholder: Tell us about your server, what it's about, its community, etc.

questions.label: Server Advertisement Message
questions.placeholder: Paste your server advertisement message here.
